tagline: Apache Spark fixes and improvements This release includes the following bug fixes and improvements made to Spark: NEAREST BY is now a supported SQL join type for top K nearest neighbor queries.
what_it_does: Apache Spark fixes and improvements This release includes the following bug fixes and improvements made to Spark: NEAREST BY is now a supported SQL join type for top K nearest neighbor queries. PARTITION is now supported for v2 catalog tables. Previously, this syntax was only available for v1 tables.
why_it_matters: Apache Spark fixes and improvements This release includes the following bug fixes and improvements made to Spark: NEAREST BY is now a supported SQL join type for top K nearest neighbor queries.
plain_summary: Apache Spark fixes and improvements This release includes the following bug fixes and improvements made to Spark: NEAREST BY is now a supported SQL join type for top K nearest neighbor queries. PARTITION is now supported for v2 catalog tables.
key_takeaway: Apache Spark fixes and improvements This release includes the following bug fixes and improvements made to Spark: NEAREST BY is now a supported SQL join type for top K nearest neighbor queries.
